code:
import io
import string

fn abs_val(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0

  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      return Err("index error")
    end

    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      return Err("parse error")
    end

    let a = abs_val(n)

    if first
      best_val = n
      best_abs = a
      first = false
    else if a < best_abs
      best_val = n
      best_abs = a
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  print("min_abs=#{best_val}")
  Ok(())
end
